ThingsI’ve learnedin my 20s

No one has it figured out, and that’s okay.

YOURBRAND

Stop shrinking tomake others comfortable.

You don’t have to dim your light for people who refuse to see you shine.

YOURBRAND

Romanticizethetinywins.

Survived the week? Laundry done? That’s growth & power. That’s the main character arc.

YOURBRAND

You can outgrow peopleand still love them.

Distance doesn’t mean drama. It just means you’re growing in different directions.

YOURBRAND

Healingisn’tlinear.

Some days you’ll feel brand new, other days you’ll spiral over a 2018 memory. Keep showing up for yourself anyway.

YOURBRAND
